Dark Mode

Work Experience

SharkNinja

Product Design Mechanical Design DFM/DFA Prototyping Cross-functional Collaboration

At SharkNinja's NPD team, I contribute to bringing a next-generation frozen treats product line to market. My work spans design, test innovation, and cross-functional collaboration from early-stage development through validation.

The Boring Company

Mechanical system integration CAD & drawing review (GD&T validation) Fluid & ventilation routing layout MBOM preparation & part tracking DFM feedback & weldment review Cross-functional coordination (design, fabrication, supply chain) On-floor troubleshooting & assembly support

Integration Engineering Intern at The Boring Company (Bastrop, TX), supporting integration of large-scale Rock TBMs across Main Beam systems and a 10,000+ part Vertical Cassette assembly. Bridged design and build by driving critical-path items, resolving subsystem interface issues, and ensuring build readiness in a fast-paced prototype-to-production environment.

Bajaj Auto Limited

Mechanical Design Siemens NX GD&T Die Casting Injection Molding DFM/DFA FEA (ANSYS, HyperWorks) DFMEA DVP 8D Root Cause Analysis NXOpen Automation VAVE

Mechanical Design Engineer at Bajaj Auto Limited, one of India's largest two and three-wheeler manufacturers. Over 3.5 years in R&D, I designed and validated engine components across ICE and EV platforms, with designs shipping on vehicles produced at a rate of 6.3 million annually. Recognized as a top 20% performer among a cohort of 100+ engineers, twice.

Ashok Leyland

Process Optimization SOP and WIS documentation Quality Control Data collection and Analysis Pareto chart analysis Cross-functional Collaboration

Engineering intern at Ashok Leyland, contributing to two process improvement projects focused on Bharat Stage (BS) emission standard compliance and quality engineering for commercial vehicle assembly.

Rane TRW Steering Systems

Time Study Analysis Process Optimization Bottleneck Analysis SolidWorks CAD Modeling On-floor Implementation

Engineering intern at Rane TRW Steering Systems, focused on optimizing the drop-arm painting process through time study analysis, bottleneck identification, and custom equipment design. More than doubled production output over the course of the project.
